title: Spicy Gooey Russian Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A crunchy, sweetspicy cabbage stirfry with a glossy honeysauce glaze, perfect for a bold brunch.
instructions: Shred the cabbage, julienne the carrot, and slice the onion thinly. Mince the garlic and ginger.
Heat 1 tablespoon of sunflower oil in a large skillet or wok over medium‑high heat; add the onion and sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and ginger, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Increase heat to high, add the shredded cabbage and carrot, and stir‑fry for 6–7 minutes until the cabbage is tender but still crisp.
Pour soy sauce, fish sauce, and crushed red pepper flakes over the vegetables; stir to coat evenly.
In a small bowl, whisk honey, rice vinegar, water, and the remaining tablespoon of oil to make a glossy glaze.
Pour the glaze over the stir‑fried mix, tossing continuously so the sauce thickens and clings to each piece, about 2 minutes.
Drizzle optional sesame oil for aroma; remove from heat.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh chopped parsley if desired. Enjoy immediately.
